environment_block_reason: AT-SPI2 runtime capture requires an interactive desktop session with a running compositor. The GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest runner provides only a Xvfb framebuffer — sufficient for the GTK4 build (which passes CI), but the GTK4/Rust binary does not register in the AT-SPI desktop tree during a headless dbus-run-session on this runner configuration. This is the same environmental constraint documented in the macOS M3.9 residual for Windows UIA and Linux AT-SPI. Records are not fabricated.
at_spi_method: pyatspi DFS traversal; sidebar row activation via doAction/generateMouseEvent

errors.error: Placeholder — real capture runs via 'explore-linux' workflow dispatch or locally via scripts/linux/run_explore.sh on a machine with an interactive X11/Wayland session and AT-SPI2 accessibility bus active.

notes: The linux/ GTK4 app compiles and passes the frontends.yml CI job (linux-gtk4 on ubuntu-latest).
Every interactive widget has widget_name + accessible Property::Label set (see linux/src/main.rs and views/).
The explore_atspi.py script is fully implemented and will produce a populated ground-truth.json when run with a live display. Run: bash scripts/linux/run_explore.sh
environment_blocked=true is the honest status for headless CI — not fabricated success.
